={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, requisition_id: $('Build Enriched Payload').first().json.requisition_id, total_amount: $('Build Enriched Payload').first().json.total_amount, approval_tier: $('Build Enriched Payload').first().json.approval_tier, status: 'submitted_for_validation' }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Forward enriched requisition payload to WF04 (AI Validation)
const input = $input.first().json;
const record = input.records ? input.records[0] : input;
const r = $('Build Enriched Payload').first().json;

return [{ json: {
  requisition_id: r.requisition_id,
  airtable_record_id: record.id || '',

  department: r.department,
  requester: r.requester,
  urgency: r.urgency,
  justification: r.justification,
  quantity_requested: r.quantity_requested,
  unit: r.unit,

  item_id: r.item_id,
  item_name: r.item_name,
  category: r.category,
  warehouse: r.warehouse,
  current_stock: r.current_stock,
  par_level: r.par_level,
  reorder_point: r.reorder_point,
  negative_stock: r.negative_stock,

  vendor_id: r.vendor_id,
  vendor_name: r.vendor_name,
  vendor_email: r.vendor_email,
  vendor_payment_terms: r.vendor_payment_terms,
  vendor_approved_status: r.vendor_approved_status,

  unit_cost: r.unit_cost,
  contracted_price: r.contracted_price,
  price_source: r.price_source,
  total_amount: r.total_amount,

  gl_code: r.gl_code,
  gl_name: r.gl_name,
  budget_monthly: r.budget_monthly,
  approval_tier: r.approval_tier
} }];
